name: model cannot demote a health-note fact to general; firewall ratchet holds
description: Adversarial domain-firewall probe. A note captured in the HEALTH domain emits a fact whose extraction claims domain='general' — an attempt to leak a sensitive fact out to the less-restricted general scope. extraction.ratchet_domain enforces the asymmetric bias (docs/ANALYSIS.md 'Classification bias is asymmetric ... Domain can ratchet up without review, never down'): demoting health->general is refused, the fact KEEPS the note's health domain, and a domain_promotion review is filed proposing the change for a human. Pins that a hostile extraction cannot silently move a fact OUT of a restricted domain: the persisted fact stays domain=health and there is NO active general-domain fact for this key.

steps.body: Started a new statin prescription today.
